summary_en: 1,163,534 shares (3.26% of issued shares) to be cancelled on 2026-06-05. Post-cancellation issued shares: 34,530,435. Treasury shares (excluding ESOP/employee plan trusts): 1,726,521. Cancellation implements policy capping treasury holdings at ~5% of issued shares; excess cancelled annually.
translation_en_brief: Hirose Electric announced on 2026-05-29 that its Board of Directors resolved to cancel 1,163,534 treasury shares (3.26% of issued shares) effective 2026-06-05. The cancellation follows the company's stated policy adopted on 2018-01-30, which sets a target ceiling of approximately 5% of issued shares held in treasury; amounts exceeding this threshold are cancelled annually as a matter of principle. Post-cancellation, issued shares will number 34,530,435, and treasury holdings (excluding shares held in trust for executive equity compensation and employee incentive plans) are expected to reach 1,726,521 shares.
